message:
refactor(fcp-host): Apply let-chain style and API improvements

Code quality improvements across fcp-host and fcp-protocol:

1. discovery.rs style modernization:
   - Convert nested if-let to let-chain syntax (Rust 2024)
   - Change unwrap_or to unwrap_or_else for lazy evaluation
   - Make PreflightResponse::allowed() const fn
   - Use Self:: in SafetyTierExt::level() match arms
   - Fix doc comment backticks for SafetyTier

2. lib.rs:
   - Minor import/export adjustments

3. fcps.rs:
   - Protocol handling consistency improvement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
